dev.jeka.core.api.project.scaffold

Class JkProjectScaffold

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.scaffold.JkScaffold
      • dev.jeka.core.api.project.scaffold.JkProjectScaffold

  • public final class JkProjectScaffold
extends JkScaffold
    Provides features to scaffold projects.
